title: December 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 11''' is the 345th day (346th in leap years) of the year. There are 20 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1926|1926]] – [[Richard Devon]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Peter Bagge]] is born.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'' published.
*[[1996]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 3]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Republic 47|''Republic'' 47]] published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 14]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 50]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – The prop for [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] was auctioned off for $240,000.
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars Insider 138|''Star Wars Insider'' 138]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 12|''Star Wars'' (2013) 12]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 40|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 40]] published.
*2019 – [[Target Vader 6|''Target Vader'' 6]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Chapter 15: The Believer]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*[[2023]] – [[Ian Gibson]] dies.
*[[2024]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege 4|''Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege'' 4]] published.
